# MemPalace.in - MCP Hub and Integration Guide

MemPalace is an open-source, local AI memory system using a memory palace metaphor (wings, rooms, closets, drawers). 
Website: https://www.mempalace.in

## Core Benchmarks & Facts
- LongMemEval Score: 96.6% R@5 (Raw verbatim mode)
- API Cost: $0
- Cloud Dependency: None (100% Local using ChromaDB and SQLite)
- MCP Tools Exposed: 19

## Three Ways to Run MemPalace
1. DIY Local (Free): Run the Python server and ChromaDB locally.
2. Cloud Hosted (€10/mo): Use the community-managed backend at mempalace.cloud.
3. Business Automation (Custom): Wire MemPalace into WhatsApp, n8n, and CRM workflows. Built by Viswanatha Reddy at VijayaTech Labs (https://vijayantech.in).

## MCP Integrations
MemPalace connects via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to:
- Claude Code (Native marketplace install)
- ChatGPT (Via MCP bridge)
- Cursor (Code editor with persistent memory)
- Gemini CLI (Auto server + save hooks)
- n8n / Pabbly Connect (Automated workflows)

## 19 Available MCP Tools
- Read: mempalace_status, mempalace_list_wings, mempalace_list_rooms, mempalace_get_taxonomy, mempalace_search, mempalace_check_duplicate, mempalace_get_aaak_spec
- Write: mempalace_add_drawer, mempalace_delete_drawer
- Knowledge Graph: mempalace_kg_query, mempalace_kg_add, mempalace_kg_invalidate, mempalace_kg_timeline, mempalace_kg_stats
- Navigation & Agents: mempalace_traverse, mempalace_find_tunnels, mempalace_graph_stats, mempalace_diary_write, mempalace_diary_read

## About the Creator
This hub is maintained as an independent community resource. Custom n8n, Pabbly Connect, and WhatsApp API integrations for MemPalace are provided by VijayaTech Labs / atharva Labs.
